channel.title: Physical Sciences Reviews
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Physical Sciences Reviews

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Faris M. AL-Oqla, Nashat Nawafleh DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/psr-2024-frontmatter12

item.title: A facile and efficient one-pot 3-component reaction (3-CR) method for the synthesis of thiazine-based heterocyclic compounds using zwitterion adduct intermediates

item.title: Green carbon-based adsorbents for water treatment in Sub-Saharan Africa
